case_title: MIDLAND FUDNING LLC VS. SHARON ITCHENER

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ITCHENER, SHARON
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC SERVED AUG-11-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ITCHENER, SHARON
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-04-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ITCHENER, SHARON $3,574.30 PRINCIPAL, $529.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,103.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ITCHENER, SHARON
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-04-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ITCHENER, SHARON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-2011
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUDNING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ITCHENER, SHARON
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-04-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
